name: sdlc-plugin
description: Enforces an 8-phase SDLC workflow for Claude Code: Plan, Analyze, Design, Build, Test, Deploy, Support, Docs. Keeps the human in the lead through explicit phase gates, enforces plan-before-code and surgical-edit discipline, and degrades gracefully when Git/ticketing/observability integrations are absent.
_devFiles_comment: Consumed by scripts/package.sh — excluded from consumer distribution. Not recognized by the Claude Code installer.
